subcodes.first_line: O Hadi! God willing, mayest thou be guided by the light of guidance that hath dawned and shineth forth from the horizon of the heaven of divine Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هادی انشاء الله بنور هدایت که از افق سماء مشیت الهیه مشرق و لائحست مهتدی شوی ای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
